query: vintage photograph with light leak streaks across edge film burn artifact lo-fi
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: light leak — film burn streaks, analog defects, motion-blur light trails, lo-fi authenticity

response.objective_caption: A large vessel hull fills the left side of the frame, showing horizontal rows of rivets or steel plating. To the right sits a dark rectangular mass, possibly a dock structure or piece of equipment. In the distant background, faint vertical elements resembling antennae or masts rise above the horizon line beneath an overcast sky. The image is rendered in sepia monochrome.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A large vessel hull fills the left side of the frame, but extreme blur and soft focus smear the rivets and steel plating into horizontal streaks so that surfaces dissolve into ambiguity with no fine texture. To the right sits a dark rectangular mass, possibly a dock structure, lost in the same hazy lack of detail. In the distant background, faint vertical elements rise above a washed-out horizon beneath a flat, oppressive sepia gloom that crushes tonal separation, rendering the maritime scene in a dreamlike, unfocused haze.
